OTP write data, bit-enable mask, and target address

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x44
Size:
0x4
Source:
otp_rf.rdl

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:16] wr_addr rw 0x0 OTP byte address to write
[15:8] wr_biten rw 0x0 bit-enable mask (1 = allow programming that bit)
[7:0] wr_data rw 0x0 data byte to write
